attributes.name: Adult Intermediate - Tuesday 6:15pm
attributes.description: Group instruction includes a 30 minute class on the Olympic rink and 30 minute supervised practice on the NHL rink. Prerequisite: Adult Beginner 2/3.Intermediate 1 (Gamma equivalent) & Adult Intermediate Curriculum: 1. Left Forward Outside 3-Turn 2. Right Forward Outside 3-Turn 3. Left Forward Inside Mohawk 4. Right Forward Inside Mohawk 5. Hockey Stop 6. Introduction to Backward Edges  7. Left Forward Inside 3-Turn 8. Right Forward Inside 3-Turn 9. Forward Outside Edges 10. Forward Inside Edges 11. Lunge or Shoot the Duck 12. One-half Flip
